metadata.description: Engineering vs Executive phrasing variants for the same idea.

examples.engineering: Optimized workflow using [method/tool]; cycle time 8h→3h; error rate −35%
examples.executive: Streamlined workflow to improve speed and quality (cycle time −62%, defects −35%); enabled faster decisions

examples.engineering: Increased p95 uptime from 99.3%→99.9% via redundancy and alerting
examples.executive: Reduced downtime and customer impact (p95 uptime 99.9%) through reliability investments
